name: Quick Saucy Chicken Casserole
recipeIngredient: 2 cups Bisquick Original or Reduced Fat Baking Mix
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 450°F.
2. In an ungreased 13x9x2-inch baking dish, mix together the cooked chicken, cream of mushroom soup, frozen vegetables, poultry seasoning, and garlic salt.
3. Stir in the Bisquick and milk until blended.
4. Pour the mixture over the chicken.
5. Sprinkle with parsley.
6. Bake for 30 to 32 minutes, or until the crust is light golden brown.
